Class GraphicsUtils

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.util.GraphicsUtils
public class GraphicsUtils extends Object
Graphics-related utilities.

    Method
    Description
    void
    drawImageOriginCenter(RenderCanvas canvas, Image image, double x, double y, double w, double h)
    Draws an image on the given canvas as if the origin is in the center, not in the top-left corner.
    RenderableID<?>
    getTargetObject(MouseEvent event)
    Returns the ID of the object that the mouse cursor hovers over as specified by the given MouseEvent instance.

    Runs the given code, disabling redraws on the given stage, and returns the code's result.

    Runs the given code, disabling redraws on the given stage.

  • Constructor Details

    • GraphicsUtils

      public GraphicsUtils()

  • Method Details

    • drawImageOriginCenter

      public void drawImageOriginCenter(RenderCanvas canvas, Image image, double x, double y, double w, double h)
      Draws an image on the given canvas as if the origin is in the center, not in the top-left corner.
      Parameters:
      canvas - the canvas to draw on
      image - the image to draw
      x - the X coordinate of center
      y - the Y coordinate of center
      w - the preferred width
      h - the preferred height
      See Also:
      • RenderCanvas.drawImage(Image, double, double, double, double)

    • runWithoutStageRedraw

      public void runWithoutStageRedraw(Stage stage, Runnable run)
      Runs the given code, disabling redraws on the given stage.

      Note for Scratchers: This method's functionality is similar to "run without screen refresh" in custom blocks, except you can use it with any code.

      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to suppress redraws for
      run - what should be executed

    • getWithoutStageRedraw

      public <T> T getWithoutStageRedraw(Stage stage, Supplier<T> run)
      Runs the given code, disabling redraws on the given stage, and returns the code's result.

      Note for Scratchers: This method's functionality is similar to "run without screen refresh" in custom blocks, except you can use it with any code.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of return value
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to suppress redraws for
      run - what should be executed
      Returns:
      the value returned by run

    • getTargetObject

      public RenderableID<?> getTargetObject(MouseEvent event)
      Returns the ID of the object that the mouse cursor hovers over as specified by the given MouseEvent instance. If no object was targeted, returns null. This can be treated as the stage itself being targeted.
      Parameters:
      event - a certain event related to mouse
      Returns:
      the target renderable object, or null if no object was targeted
